svg.text: A Secure, Scalable, Multi-Tenant Procurement Operating Platform

g.text: React 19 SPA · TanStack Router & Query · role-aware UI
NestJS modular monolith — 11 domains, Fastify HTTP, Zod-validated
API (NestJS + Fastify) · Validation (Zod) · Rate Limiting (Redis) · CSRF + Helmet · Idempotency-Key
Tenant-isolated Postgres · Redis · Worker pool · Transactional Outbox + DLQ
Container orchestration · TLS edge · CI/CD delivery
Enforced across every layer · audited · operationally proven
